engine_logic: Adaptability: +1 to all stats (Standard) or +1 Feat (Variant). No natural weaknesses, but no specialized school scaling.
unique_hook: Universal Vessel: Can attune to any school-specific artifact without racial restriction.

engine_logic: Probability Manipulation: 'Brave' provides Advantage vs Frightened (Enchantment). 'Lucky' allows rerolling 1s.
weakness: Evocation (Heavy): Small size limits the casting of 'Heavy' material component spells.
unique_hook: Halfling Nimbleness: Can move through spaces occupied by creatures larger than them (Transmutation logic).

engine_logic: Elemental Conduit: Breath weapon scales as an Evocation spell. Damage type resistance is permanent.
weakness: Illusion: Low natural investigative stats make them susceptible to sensory deception.
unique_hook: Draconic Presence: Gem variants gain 30ft Telepathy (Divination/Enchantment hybrid).

engine_logic: Gnome Cunning: Advantage on all INT/WIS/CHA saves vs Magic. This is a passive Abjuration shell.
unique_hook: Svirfneblin Camouflage: Advantage on Stealth in rocky terrain (Illusion logic).

engine_logic: Infernal Legacy: Innate scaling of 'Hellish Rebuke' (Evocation) and 'Darkness' (Evocation/Illusion).
weakness: Abjuration (Holy): Susceptible to 'Banishment' or 'Dispel Evil and Good'.
unique_hook: Fire Resistance: Reduces all incoming Evocation (Fire) damage by 50%.

engine_logic: Relentless Endurance: If reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead (Necromancy/Abjuration hybrid).
weakness: Enchantment/Illusion: Very low mental saves; easily charmed or confused.
unique_hook: Savage Attacks: Extra damage die on critical hits (Physical Evocation).

engine_logic: Stone's Endurance: Use Reaction to reduce damage by 1d12 + CON (Abjuration logic).
weakness: Enchantment: Vulnerable to psychic control due to high physical/low mental focus.
unique_hook: Powerful Build: Count as one size larger for carrying/pushing (Transmutation logic).

engine_logic: Feline Agility: Double movement speed for 1 turn (Transmutation).
weakness: Abjuration (Binding): Curses or spells that restrict movement (Hold Person) are critical counters.
unique_hook: Cat's Talent: Permanent proficiency in Perception and Stealth.

engine_logic: Celestial Revelation: Transformation provides flight or AoE damage/healing (Transmutation/Evocation).
weakness: Necromancy (Cursed): Targeted vulnerability to 'Vile' or 'Unholy' damage variants.
unique_hook: Healing Hands: Touch-based healing pool (Evocation) independent of spell slots.

engine_logic: Integrated Protection: Permanent +1 AC. Does not eat, sleep, or breathe.
weakness: Transmutation (Rust): Vulnerable to 'Heat Metal' or rust-based monster effects.
unique_hook: Construct Nature: Immune to the 'Exhaustion' status effect from environmental sources.
